property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\TRINIKZ\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0eGzmrh;C:\Users\TRINIKZ\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;e:\cursor\resources\app\codeBin;C:\Users\TRINIKZ\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\TRINIKZ\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;E:\cursor\resources\app\bin;c:\Users\TRINIKZ\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-26.409.20454-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
22:18:07.400 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplicationTests]: MuralisApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:18:07.685 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplication for test class clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplicationTests 22:18:07.936 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplicationTests]: MuralisApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:18:07.939 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplication for test class clients.example.muralis.MuralisApplicationTests 22:18:08.116 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
